name: Grewal RE Group Austin Real Estate Calculators
description: Free Austin TX real estate calculators by Shivraj Grewal, Grewal RE Group. Buyer, seller, and investor tools with Austin-specific defaults.

item.name: Home Affordability Calculator
item.description: Calculates maximum home price based on gross income, co-borrower income, monthly debts, down payment, interest rate, DTI limit, Travis County property tax, insurance, HOA, and PMI. Outputs: conservative price (28% front-end DTI), maximum price (back-end DTI), monthly PITI breakdown, down payment required, and DTI visualization.

item.name: Mortgage Calculator
item.description: Calculates full PITI monthly payment, total interest, total payments, and year-by-year amortization table. Inputs: purchase price, down payment, rate, term, Travis County tax rate, insurance, HOA, PMI.

item.name: Rent vs Buy Calculator
item.description: Compares total cost of renting vs net cost of buying (gross minus equity) over any time horizon. Inputs: rent, rent increase, price, down payment, rate, years, property tax, HOA, maintenance, appreciation rate.
keywords: is it better to rent or buy Austin

item.name: Rate Buydown Calculator
item.description: Calculates 2/1 and 3/2/1 temporary rate buydown total subsidy, year-by-year reduced payments, and monthly savings vs full note rate. Inputs: purchase price, down payment, note rate, buydown type.

item.name: Austin Home Value Estimator
item.description: Two-step lead form that shows an instant area market snapshot (medians, days on market, inventory) based on neighborhood, then collects property details so Shivraj can return a personalized comp-based valuation within one business day. Texas is a non-disclosure state — this tool connects sellers with MLS data they cannot get elsewhere.
keywords: what is my Austin home worth

item.name: Seller Net Proceeds Calculator
item.description: Calculates estimated net proceeds from selling an Austin home: sale price minus agent commission, seller closing costs, mortgage payoff, and repairs or concessions. Outputs: commission amount, closing cost amount, mortgage payoff, and final net proceeds. Includes a lead form to request an exact line-by-line net sheet.
keywords: how much will I net selling my home Austin

item.name: Cap Rate Calculator
item.description: Calculates NOI, cap rate, gross yield, and implied market value for Austin investment properties. Inputs: gross rent, vacancy, purchase price, property tax rate, insurance, management fee, maintenance, HOA, market cap rate for comparison.

item.name: Cash-on-Cash Return Calculator
item.description: Calculates annual pre-tax cash flow, cash-on-cash return, DSCR, and total cash invested for leveraged Austin rental properties. Inputs: purchase price, rent, vacancy, down payment, mortgage rate, closing costs, rehab, property tax, insurance, management, maintenance.

item.name: BRRRR Calculator
item.description: Calculates BRRRR strategy outcomes: all-in cost, refinance proceeds, capital recaptured, capital left in deal, equity retained, and post-refi cash flow. Inputs: purchase, rehab, closing costs, holding costs, ARV, refi LTV, refi rate, rent, expenses.

item.name: STR vs LTR Calculator
item.description: Compares short-term rental (Airbnb/VRBO) vs long-term rental income side-by-side. Inputs: ADR, occupancy, platform fee, management, cleaning cost, utilities, permit, and LTR rent, vacancy, management. Outputs: annual cash flow and cash-on-cash for both strategies.
